### Logistic Sigmoid

$$\sigma(x)=\frac{1}{1+e^{-x}}$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/simple.py#L13"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### Lambda Function

$$\lambda(x)=\frac{1}{2x}\left\[\sigma(x)-\frac{1}{2}\right\]$$

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/SuzuSys/KalmanPaper/blob/main/KalmanPaper/simple.py#L19"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>
